title: Renewable Diesel Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q3 2025
content:
Global Renewable Diesel Output Down 1.1% in Q2 2025 vs Q1, Third Straight Decline

Global Renewable Diesel Production Slips for Third Consecutive Quarter, Down 1.1% in Q2 2025 vs Q1 2025, as North American Output Contracts Amid Weak LCFS Credit prices, and New Policy Excluding US Imports from Credit Eligibility. With the shift to the 45Z Clean Fuel Production Credit, U.S. imports of biodiesel and renewable diesel have fallen sharply. In 1H25, renewable diesel imports averaged just 5,000 b/d, compared to 33,000 b/d in 1H24.
author: Sanyam Malik
